answer:
Devin provides a self-serve platform that includes a free tier for individuals [1][2]. The Free plan offers limited usage, access to specific features like Devin Review and DeepWiki, unlimited inline edits, and unlimited Tab completions [3][1]. It does not provide the ongoing paid usage or higher quotas available in the Pro, Max, or Teams plans [3][4][5].

There is no dedicated developer API tier; however, paid self-serve users receive a usage quota that refreshes automatically [3][6]. If you exceed your included quota, you can purchase extra usage billed at model-specific API pricing [3][6]. Enterprise customers maintain access through custom agreements [2][6].
